{"query":"Ukraine defense minister appointment successor Fedorov removal cabinet reshuffle July 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1605,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.defensenews.com/global/europe/2026/07/15/fedorov-out-as-ukraines-defense-minister-in-major-government-shake-up/","title":"Fedorov out as Ukraine’s defense minister in major government shake-up","content":"Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy dismissed Mykhailo Fedorov as the country’s minister of defense after just six months in office as part of a major shake-up in Kyiv’s leadership.
It followed Prime Minister Yulia Svyrydenko’s resignation at the request of the president on Tuesday, which triggered the removal of and subsequent need to reappoint all the ministers currently serving in her cabinet.
Zelenskyy has not publicly explained the decision or named a successor.
Others saw his initiatives as too progressive, according to Kyiv-based political analyst Volodymyr Fesenko in comments to Kyiv Independent.
“There is alleged friction in Fedorov’s relationship with [Commander-in-Chief Oleksandr] Syrskyi,” Fesenko said.
Ukraine’s Interior Minister, Ihor Klymenko, has reportedly been offered the job to replace Fedorov, according to the Kyiv Independent, which cited anonymous sources."},{"url":"https://www.kyivpost.com/post/80344","title":"Fedorov Dismissed From Defense Minister Title as Zelensky Reshuffles Cabinet","content":"2 days ago — Ukrainian Defence Minister Mykhailo Fedorov said on July 15, 2026 he was resigning as part of President Volodymyr Zelensky's cabinet reshuffle.Read more
In brief: Mykhailo Fedorov was dismissed as Ukraine's defense minister amid a broader Cabinet reshuffle, witH Minister of Internal Affairs Ihor Klymenko expected to succeed him.
Mykhailo Fedorov was dismissed as Ukraine’s defense minister on Wednesday, following the resignation of Prime Minister Yulia Svyrydenko, a decision that came amid President Volodymyr Zelensky’s broader reshuffle of the Cabinet.
Members of parliament Olha Vasylevska-Smahliuk and Yaroslav Zhelezniak said Zelensky is expected to nominate Minister of Internal Affairs Ihor Klymenko for the post, RBC-Ukraine reported.
Sources within the ruling Servant of the People party told Ukrainska Pravda that Zelensky informed lawmakers of the decision during a closed-door meeting focused on the government reshuffle.
Fedorov’s tenure at the ministry began in January 2026 and lasted only seven months.
Svyrydenko has been offered the position of Ukraine’s ambassador to the United States, though as of Tuesday morning she had not yet accepted the new role, according to RBC-Ukraine.
However, he said he was unable to fully complete the ministry’s organizational transformation according to NATO standards, noting that while a new structure was launched and many personnel dismissed, personnel who obstructed change should have been removed more decisively."},{"url":"https://newsukraine.rbc.ua/news/zelenskyy-sacks-defense-minister-fedorov-1784186125.html","title":"Fedorov sacked in Zelenskyy's sweeping government reshuffle | RBC-Ukraine","content":"Mykhailo Fedorov is to be replaced as defense minister after the resignation of Prime Minister Yuliia Svyrydenko's government.
After Fedorov's dismissal, current interior minister Ihor Klymenko has been tapped to lead Ukraine's Defense Ministry in the new government."},{"url":"https://www.reuters.com/business/aerospace-defense/ukraine-reshuffle-puts-defence-minister-focus-war-grinds-2026-07-15/","title":"Ukraine's Zelenskiy endorses energy boss as PM, will ...","date":"2 days ago","content":"2 days ago — Replacement of defence minister Mykhailo Fedorov triggers criticism Change may dent public, Fedorov's re-appointment is not guaranteed ..."},{"url":"https://tvpworld.com/94358175/ukraine-zelenskyy-fires-mykhailo-fedorov-in-cabinet-reshuffle","title":"Zelenskyy dismisses Ukrainian defense minister in major ...","date":"2 days ago","content":"2 days ago — Ukraine's defense minister Mykhailo Fedorov, a rising star in Kyiv political circles, has been dismissed after just six months in the job as ...Read more"},{"url":"https://theworld.org/segments/2026/07/16/ukraines-defense-minister-dismissed-amid-cabinet-changes","title":"Ukraine's defense minister dismissed amid cabinet changes","date":"2 days ago","content":"2 days ago — Ukrainians took to the streets of Kyiv Thursday to protest the removal of Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov by President Volodymyr Zelenskyy."}]}
